column6: select * , row_number() over (partition by PackageName order by StartTime desc ) rn   into #rn from [AO-REGREP-DB-LSN].RegReportDB_Prod.[dbo].[Reg_SSIS_Log] where PackageName='HedgeServerToLiquidity_Mapping'  declare @sum int = (select sum(case when Status='Completed' then 0 else 1 end ) from #rn where rn in(1,2))  IF @sum=2 	Begin  	EXEC msdb.dbo.sp_send_dbmail    								 @recipients = 'regtech@etoro.com',   							     @body = 'The stored procedure finished with error twice.',   								 @subject = 'HedgeServerToLiquidity_Mapping Fail ' , 								 @importance ='High';      END
IF (SELECT master.[sys].[fn_hadr_is_primary_replica] (DB_NAME())) = 0         RAISERROR('Not Primary replica, exit job', 16, 1)
declare @Date as Date = convert(varchar,getutcdate(),121)  exec  [AO-REGREP-DB-LSN].RegReportDB_Prod.dbo.SP_Reg_SSIS_Log 'Start',@Date,'PROD - Regulations - ALL_NEW',''
EXEC dbo.sp_start_job N'PROD - Regulations - Inport Dictionaries'
EXEC dbo.sp_start_job N'PROD - Regulations - Movments Report'
EXEC dbo.sp_start_job N'PROD - Regulations - ASIC Positions'
EXEC dbo.sp_start_job N'PROD - Regulations - MIFID2 TRAX'

declare @IsJOBInProgress int = 1  while  @IsJOBInProgress>0 Begin  waitfor delay '00:01:00'  set @IsJOBInProgress =(select count(1) 						FROM  						(select PackageName,max(StartTime) MX_StartTime 						from [AO-REGREP-DB-LSN].RegReportDB_Prod.dbo.Reg_SSIS_Log 						where PackageName in ( 												'MIFID2', 												'ASIC_Positions_agg_trn_sym' 												) 						and  StartTime>=CAST(getutcdate() as date) 						and EndTime is NULL 						Group by PackageName 						)  aaa 						)  END
EXEC dbo.sp_start_job N'PROD - Regulations - AML DNB CRYPTO'

declare @IsJOBInProgress int = 1  while  @IsJOBInProgress>0 Begin  waitfor delay '00:05:00'  set @IsJOBInProgress =(select count(1) 						FROM  						(select PackageName,max(StartTime) MX_StartTime 						from [AO-REGREP-DB-LSN].RegReportDB_Prod.dbo.Reg_SSIS_Log 						where PackageName in ('MIFID2 TRAX', 'MIFID2', 												'EMIR2REFIT', 												'ASIC_Positions_agg_trn_sym', 												 'Actimize_Daily', 												'Actimize_only_uat_upload', 												'BestEX_Daily', 												'Aml', 												'AML_DNB', 												'Regulation_Movments_Report' 												/*,'RTS_All'*/ 												) 						and  StartTime>=CAST(getutcdate() as date) 						and EndTime is NULL 						Group by PackageName 						)  aaa 						)  END

declare @IsJOBInProgress int = 1  while  @IsJOBInProgress>0 Begin  waitfor delay '00:05:00'  set @IsJOBInProgress =( 					   SELECT  count(1) 						FROM msdb.dbo.sysjobactivity ja  						LEFT JOIN msdb.dbo.sysjobhistory jh ON ja.job_history_id = jh.instance_id 						JOIN msdb.dbo.sysjobs j ON ja.job_id = j.job_id 						JOIN msdb.dbo.sysjobsteps js 							ON ja.job_id = js.job_id 							AND ISNULL(ja.last_executed_step_id,0)+1 = js.step_id 						WHERE 						  ja.session_id = ( 							SELECT TOP 1 session_id FROM msdb.dbo.syssessions ORDER BY agent_start_date DESC 						  ) 						AND start_execution_date is not null 						AND stop_execution_date is null 						and  j.name  in ('PROD - Regulations - AMLDaily', 'PROD - Regulations - ACTIMIZE') 						)  END
declare @Date as Date = convert(varchar,getutcdate(),121)  exec  [AO-REGREP-DB-LSN].[RegReportDB_Prod].dbo.SP_Reg_SSIS_Log 'Completed',@Date,'PROD - Regulations - ALL_NEW',''
IF (SELECT master.[sys].[fn_hadr_is_primary_replica] (DB_NAME())) = 0         RAISERROR('Not Primary replica, exit job', 16, 1)

column3: RUN wait import of FCA and EASMA
column6: declare @allprocess int =0 declare @ReportDate  date =cast(getdate() as date )  while  (@allprocess<2 ) Begin print('delay') waitfor delay '00:00:30' select @allprocess=count(*) from [AO-REGREP-DB-LSN].RegReportDB_Prod.[dbo].[Reg_SSIS_Log] where    PackageName in ( 'PY_FCA_DLTINS','PY_FIRDS_DLTINS') and cast( EndTime as date ) = cast (getdate() as date ) and Status = 'Completed' end
IF (SELECT master.[sys].[fn_hadr_is_primary_replica] (DB_NAME())) = 0         RAISERROR('Not Primary replica, exit job', 16, 1)

DECLARE @IsJOBInProgress int = 1  WHILE @IsJOBInProgress > 0 BEGIN   WAITFOR DELAY '00:03:00'    SET @IsJOBInProgress = (SELECT     COUNT(1)   FROM (SELECT     PackageName,     MAX(StartTime) MX_StartTime   FROM [AO-REGREP-DB-LSN].RegReportDB_Prod.dbo.Reg_SSIS_Log   WHERE PackageName IN (   'PROD - Regulations - ALL_NEW'    )   AND StartTime >= CAST(GETUTCDATE() AS date)   AND EndTime IS NULL   GROUP BY PackageName) aaa)  END
